real_dual_axis_rule.outer_axis: x/z family determined by inner attitude

hard_constraints.excitation_form: legal leave-and-return bursts around same anchor only

best_candidate_motion.name: ch3targeted_z11_large_pos
best_candidate_motion.description: incumbent skeleton + one localized z-family outer excitation-return burst at anchor 11: outer +90° then outer -90°, each 5 s rotation + 5 s dwell; anchor 11 post-static reduced from 70 s to 50 s to keep total time 1200 s

scientific_bottom_line.summary: No. State-targeted legal excitation found a small overall improvement with a localized z11 outer burst, but it did not materially beat the incumbent because the maximum weak channel remained essentially unchanged and the intended weak-state repair (especially Ka2_y and dKg_zz together) did not land.
scientific_bottom_line.promote_reason: best overall mean/median among targeted legal excitations while preserving already-good xz / Ka2_z channels
scientific_bottom_line.do_not_replace_incumbent_reason: gain is small (mean -0.277 pct-points, median -0.240), max is slightly worse by 0.014 pct-points, and weak channels remain dominated by Ka2_y ~99.94 and dKg_zz ~76.52
